title: Svelte kit endpoints sdk python (Integrations)
summary: Svelte kit endpoints sdk python — integrations workflow walkthrough.

content.text:
## Goal

Demonstrate "svelte kit endpoints (sdk python)" against the Tinybox integrations surface end to end.

## Walkthrough

# Step 1 — prepare a bucket for the integrations workflow.
tinybox buckets create my-bucket --region us-east-1
Apply the recipe; verify with the API reference under [API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get).
